mapper.sql: id, challenge_id, type, amount, balance_before, balance_after, description, related_user_id, related_meeting_id, related_expense_request_id, related_barcode_id, merchant_name, merchant_category, pg_provider, pg_approval_number, memo, memo_updated_at, memo_updated_by, created_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO woorido.ledger_entries ( id, challenge_id, type, amount, description, balance_before, balance_after, related_user_id, related_meeting_id, related_expense_request_id, related_barcode_id, merchant_name, merchant_category, pg_provider, pg_approval_number, memo, memo_updated_at, memo_updated_by, created_at ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{challengeId}, #{type}, #{amount}, #{description}, #{balanceBefore}, #{balanceAfter}, #{relatedUserId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{relatedMeetingId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{relatedExpenseRequestId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{relatedBarcodeId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{merchantName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{merchantCategory, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{pgProvider, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{pgApprovalNumber, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{memo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{memoUpdatedAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{memoUpdatedBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSTIMESTAMP )
mapper.select: SELECT id, challenge_id, type, amount, balance_before, balance_after, description, related_user_id, related_meeting_id, related_expense_request_id, related_barcode_id, merchant_name, merchant_category, pg_provider, pg_approval_number, memo, memo_updated_at, memo_updated_by, created_at FROM ( SELECT le.id, le.challenge_id, le.type, le.amount, le.balance_before, le.balance_after, le.description, le.related_user_id, le.related_meeting_id, le.related_expense_request_id, le.related_barcode_id, le.merchant_name, le.merchant_category, le.pg_provider, le.pg_approval_number, le.memo, le.memo_updated_at, le.memo_updated_by, le.created_at, ROWNUM AS RNUM FROM ( SELECT FROM woorido.ledger_entries WHERE challenge_id = #{challengeId} ORDER BY created_at DESC ) le WHERE ROWNUM <= (#{offset} + #{limit}) ) WHERE RNUM > #{offset}

SELECT NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN type IN ('SUPPORT', 'ENTRY_FEE', 'REFUND') THEN amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS TOTAL_INCOME, NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN type = 'EXPENSE' THEN amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS TOTAL_EXPENSE, NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN type IN ('SUPPORT', 'ENTRY_FEE', 'REFUND') THEN amount ELSE -amount END), 0) AS BALANCE, COUNT(*) AS ENTRY_COUNT FROM woorido.ledger_entries WHERE challenge_id = #{challengeId}
